name: Quick Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips over a double boiler with very low heat, stirring until completely melted.
2. Remove from the heat source.
3. Add condensed milk, butter, and vanilla to the melted chocolate, blending thoroughly.
4. Stir in chopped nuts.
5. Pour mixture into a lightly oiled 8-inch square pan.
6. Allow to cool at room temperature before cutting into even squares.
This recipe makes approximately 1 1/4 pounds of fudge.
